flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Wyoming rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.3k → $7.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Wyoming rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($20.8k → $24.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Wyoming fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).
